account_modal.cancel_subscription_confir: Cancel your subscription? It will stay active until the end of the current billing period.
account_modal.cancel_subscription_failed: Failed to cancel subscription. Please try again or use Manage.
account_modal.cancel_subscription_succes: Subscription canceled. Access continues until the end of the billing period.
account_modal.link_google_already_linked: That Google account is already linked to another player.
account_modal.link_google_error: Couldn't link your Google account. Please make sure you're signed in and try again.
account_modal.link_google_failed: Couldn't start Google linking. Please try again.
account_modal.no_stats: No stats available yet. Play some games to start tracking.
account_modal.subscription_portal_failed: Failed to open the subscription management portal.
build_menu.warship_shift_hint: Hold Shift and drag to select multiple warships at once

clan_modal.banned_players_count: {count, plural, one {# banned player} other {# banned players}}
clan_modal.confirm_ban: Are you sure you want to ban this player? They will be removed from the clan and unable to rejoin.
clan_modal.confirm_disband: Are you sure you want to disband [{tag}] {name}? This cannot be undone.
clan_modal.confirm_kick: Are you sure you want to kick this member?
clan_modal.error_banned: You are banned from this clan.
clan_modal.error_banned_reason: You are banned from this clan. Reason: {reason}
clan_modal.error_rate_limited_generic: Please wait before joining another clan
clan_modal.history_members_only: Game history is visible to clan members only.
clan_modal.join_request_sent: Join request sent! Waiting for approval.
clan_modal.members_visible_to_members: Member list is visible to clan members only.
clan_modal.no_clans: You're not in any clans yet.
clan_modal.open_clan_desc: Anyone can join without an invite
clan_modal.pending_requests_count: {count, plural, one {# pending request} other {# pending requests}}
clan_modal.search_members_placeholder: Filter current page by ID or role...
clan_modal.sign_in_for_clans: Sign in to join and manage clans
clan_modal.title: Clans
clan_modal.transfer_warning: This will make the selected member the new leader. You will become a regular member. This action cannot be undone.

control_panel.allied_afk_neighbor_info: You can attack disconnected players even if you are allied with them.
control_panel.army_limit_warning: You're near your army limit! Consider sending troops to teammates.
control_panel.low_troops_warning: You are very low on troops - You should always keep some troops for defense.
control_panel.traitor_neighbor_info: You can betray traitors without becoming a traitor yourself.
events_display.alliance_nukes_destroyed_: {count, plural, one {# nuke launched by {name} was destroyed due to the alliance} other {# nukes launched by {name} were destroyed due to the alliance}}
{count, plural, one {# nuke launched toward {name} was destroyed due to the alliance} other {# nukes launched toward {name} were destroyed due to the alliance}}
events_display.trade_ship_captured: Your trade ship was captured by {name}

friends.cannot_friend_self: You can't add yourself as a friend
friends.error_conflict: Already friends or request already sent
friends.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
friends.no_friends: You haven't added any friends yet.
friends.request_auto_accepted: Friend request accepted — you are now friends
friends.team_info: Friends are placed on the same team.

graphics_setting.classic_numbers_desc: Pixel font for structure level numbers (off uses the smooth font)
graphics_setting.colored_names_desc: Show player names in their player color or in black
graphics_setting.coordinate_grid_opacity_desc: How opaque the coordinate grid is (lower lets more things show through)
graphics_setting.fallout_desc: Show the green nuclear fallout glow on irradiated territory. Disable to improve performance
graphics_setting.highlight_brighten_desc: How strongly the border brightens on hover (0 to disable)
graphics_setting.highlight_fill_desc: How strongly territory brightens on hover (0 to disable)
graphics_setting.highlight_thicken_desc: How much the border thickens on hover
graphics_setting.hover_fade_desc: How visible names are while your cursor is over them (1 to disable fading)
graphics_setting.hover_glow_alpha_desc: How bright the white glow behind the hovered player's name is (0 to disable)
graphics_setting.hover_glow_width_desc: How far the white glow extends behind the hovered player's name
graphics_setting.icon_size_desc: How large structure icons are drawn on the map
graphics_setting.lighting_ambient_desc: Darkens the map and adds a glow around structures (0 = off)
graphics_setting.lighting_unit_glow_desc: How far the glow spreads around units and structures
graphics_setting.name_cull_desc: Hide names smaller than this size
graphics_setting.nuke_color_desc: Color of the fallout tint left on territory after a nuke.
graphics_setting.rail_distance_desc: How far zoomed out train tracks remain visible
graphics_setting.rail_thickness_desc: How wide train tracks are drawn
graphics_setting.territory_alpha_desc: How opaque the territory fill is (lower lets terrain show through)
graphics_setting.territory_sat_desc: How vivid the territory fill colors are (lower mutes them)
graphics_setting.title: Graphics Settings

heads_up_message.ffa_collusion: Reminder: teaming up before the game is not allowed in FFA
help_modal.action_esc: Closes menu. Cancels unit build preview.
help_modal.action_warship_multiselect: Select multiple warships (drag to draw selection box)
help_modal.option_speed: Speed - Adjust the game speed. Unavailable in public games.
help_modal.troubleshooting_desc: If you experience performance issues, crashes, or other problems while playing OpenFront, please visit our Troubleshooting page for help diagnosing and fixing common issues:
host_modal.leave_confirmation: Are you sure you want to leave the lobby?

ios_banner.modal_desc: Your browser doesn't support fullscreen, but you can add OpenFront to your Home Screen for an immersive experience:
ios_banner.step_open: Open from your Home Screen — launches fullscreen without the address bar
ios_banner.step_share: Tap the Share button in your browser
ios_banner.text: For fullscreen, add OpenFront to your Home Screen

kick_reason.duplicate_session: Kicked from game (you may have been playing on another tab)
kick_reason.host_left: The host has left the lobby.

leaderboard_modal.loss_score_tooltip: Weighted losses based on clan participation and match difficulty
leaderboard_modal.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard_modal.win_score_tooltip: Weighted wins based on clan participation and match difficulty

map_component.favorites_empty: Click the star on any map to favourite it

news_box.firefox_warning: OpenFront.io doesn't perform well with [Firefox-based browsers](https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Web_browsers_based_on_Firefox). We recommend you to use a [Chromium-based browser](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chromium_(web_browser)#Browsers_based_on_Chromium) for best performance.

player_panel.kick_confirm:
Kick {name}?

They won't be able to rejoin this game.
public_lobby.join_timeout: You didn't enter the game in time.
public_lobby.title: Waiting for Game Start...

store.change_tier_failed: Couldn't update your subscription. Please try again.
store.confirm_downgrade: Downgrade to {tier}? You'll get account credit for the unused portion of your current plan.
store.confirm_upgrade: Upgrade to {tier}? You'll be charged the prorated difference now.
store.login_required: You must be logged in to purchase with currency.
store.no_flags: No flags available. Check back later for new items.
store.no_packs: No packs available. Check back later for new items.
store.no_skins: No skins available. Check back later for new items.
store.no_subscriptions: No subscriptions available. Check back later for new items.
store.not_enough_currency: Not enough currency for this purchase.
store.title: Store

troubleshooting.chromium_tip: OpenFront runs best on Chromium-based browsers.
troubleshooting.copied_to_clipboard: Info copied to the clipboard! Feel free to share it on our Discord if you need help.
troubleshooting.gpu_tip: Verify that this is the dedicated GPU, if one is available.
troubleshooting.hardware_acceleration_tip: Make sure hardware acceleration is enabled in your browser settings for optimal performance.
troubleshooting.power_saving_tip: Make sure that your browser is not set to power saving mode.
troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting

user_setting.attack_ratio_increment_desc: How much the attack ratio keybinds change per press/scroll.
user_setting.attacking_troops_overlay_de: Show attacker vs defender troop counts on active front lines.
user_setting.break_alliance_desc: Break alliance with the player whose tile is under your cursor.
user_setting.colorblind_desc: Use colorblind-friendly territory and border colors
user_setting.game_speed_down_desc: Cycle to previous game speed. Single player only.
user_setting.game_speed_up_desc: Cycle to next game speed (0.5, 1, 2, max). Single player only.
user_setting.go_to_player_desc: Toggle zooming in on the player in the beginning of a game.
user_setting.help_messages_desc: Show contextual tips and warnings during gameplay, such as army limit warnings and general gameplay advice.
user_setting.keybinds_hint: Click a key to rebind it. You can assign a single key or Shift + key combination.
user_setting.pause_game_desc: Pause or resume the game (single player and custom games for host).
user_setting.request_alliance_desc: Send an alliance request to the player whose tile is under your cursor.
user_setting.retaliate_attack_desc: Send a retaliation attack to blunt/negate the force of the most recent active attacker. Only available when you are being attacked.
username.tag_not_member: Join the {tag} clan before using its tag. Click this message to join it.
